condition.description: Defines an optional IAM condition that must be met for the policy binding to apply, specifying attributes such as title, expression, and description.

members.description: List of IAM members to be assigned the specified roles for the Pub/Sub topic.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be assigned to members, defining their level of access to the Pub/Sub topic.

topic.description: Specifies the Pub/Sub topic for which IAM binding is applied; must be an existing topic in the same project.
